overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Western-themed open world game (Red Dead Redemption 2), showing a cowboy character walking along a dirt trail through rocky wilderness terrain at night. The character stops at a wooden signpost to survey the area before continuing down the path under a starry sky with dramatic moonlit clouds.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a dirt path toward distant rocky formations under the night sky

entered.detail: large layered rock outcroppings illuminated by moonlight against the night sky
worn dirt path winding through the grassy terrain
weathered wooden posts marking the trail boundary

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dirt trail through open wilderness at night. Rocky cliff formations rise in the distance under a starry sky, while sparse vegetation lines the path.

events.description: character stops walking and stands stationary at the trail intersection
camera pans around the character to survey the surrounding landscape and trail options

agents.ego_description: standing still at a wooden signpost, rotating the camera view to survey the trail intersection and surrounding hills

entered.detail: weathered wooden signpost with directional arms indicating trail directions at the path intersection

segments.scene_description: The character stops at a wooden signpost marking a trail intersection. The camera pans around the stationary character, revealing the diverging paths and rocky terrain in the moonlight.

events.description: character resumes walking down the chosen trail path
moon briefly emerges from behind clouds, increasing illumination on the trail

agents.ego_description: walking briskly along the dirt trail through a narrowing valley between rocky hills

entered.detail: narrow passage between rocky hills leading into the distance
steep rocky terrain rising on both sides of the trail

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking through a valley trail flanked by rocky hills and canyon walls. The path narrows as it winds through the terrain, with moonlight filtering through moving clouds overhead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a moonlit wilderness that transitions from an open trail into a narrow, enclosed canyon. It begins with the character walking along a dirt path flanked by sparse vegetation, with distant rocky cliff formations silhouetted against a starry sky. As the character reaches a wooden signpost at a trail intersection, the camera pans around to reveal the diverging paths and the rugged terrain illuminated by the moon. The scene then shifts as the character resumes their journey, moving deeper into a valley where the path narrows between towering rocky hills and canyon walls. Finally, the camera follows the winding trail as moonlight filters through shifting clouds overhead, deepening the sense of enclosure within the rocky landscape.
